title: ajuga orientalis subsp. aenesia
intro: Ajuga orientalis subsp. aenesia, also known as bugleweed or ajuga, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the mint family and is native to the mountainous regions of the Balkans. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of ajuga include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and acting as a natural antacid to alleviate digestive issues. Ajuga is commonly prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal purposes, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
